Reports.title: Reports
Reports.noData: No data. Please add accounts and holdings first.
Reports.noSectorData: No sector data. Use the bulk fetch button above or set it in holding edit.
Reports.selectSubject: Please select an account or stock
Reports.noChartDataHint: Price history has not been collected yet.

Rebalancing.title: Rebalancing
Rebalancing.setTargetHint: Set target allocations to start rebalancing analysis. Click 'Set Targets' in the top right.
Rebalancing.needsRebalancing: {count} account(s) exceed the tolerance band. Rebalancing is recommended.
Rebalancing.balanced: All accounts are within ±{tolerance}% of target.

TaxCalc.title: Capital Gains Tax
TaxCalc.taxSavingHint: You have {amount} left in your deduction. Realizing gains within this limit means zero tax.
TaxCalc.noTransactions: No overseas stock sell transactions in {year}. (Add USD sell transactions in Transaction History to calculate automatically.)
TaxCalc.simulatorDesc: Enter the quantity you plan to sell to see the estimated tax in real time.
TaxCalc.note1: Overseas capital gains tax: 22% (incl. local tax) on gains above ₩2,500,000/year
TaxCalc.note2: Gains are converted to KRW at the current exchange rate
TaxCalc.note3: Gains and losses within the same year are netted together
TaxCalc.note4: This calculator is for reference only. Consult a tax professional for accurate figures.

Risk.title: Risk Metrics
Risk.noData: Not enough snapshot data. Visit the dashboard to start collecting.
Risk.periodReturnDesc: Portfolio return over the selected period
Risk.volatilityDesc: Annualized std dev of daily returns
Risk.sharpeDesc: Excess return per unit of risk

DiaryPattern.title: Psychology × Trade Pattern
DiaryPattern.description: Compare diary mood with transactions recorded on the same day.

Drip.title: DRIP Simulator
Drip.chartDesc: DRIP: reinvest dividends | Cash Dividends: accumulate dividends as cash | Growth Only: no dividends
Drip.dripBoostDesc: After {years} years: DRIP {dripVal} vs Cash Dividends {noDripVal}. DRIP is {boost}% higher.

FxAnalysis.title: FX Gain/Loss
FxAnalysis.noData: No USD accounts or holdings found.
FxAnalysis.chartTitle: Return Decomposition (Stock Return vs FX Return)
FxAnalysis.chartDesc: Blue: USD stock return | Gold: contribution from KRW/USD exchange rate change
FxAnalysis.note: Total KRW Return = (1 + stock return) × (1 + FX return) − 1. Stock return is USD-denominated; FX return reflects exchange rate change since purchase.

Alerts.title: Price Alerts
Alerts.description: Get notified when a target or stop-loss price is reached. Checked on each price refresh.
Alerts.name: Name

AccountTrendChart.title: Account Asset Trend
AccountTrendChart.noData: No snapshot data. Visit the dashboard to record today's data.

PutCallRatio.description: PCR > 1.2 Fear (contrarian buy) · < 0.7 Greed (contrarian sell) · CBOE delayed data
PutCallRatio.chartLegend: Dashed: VIX estimate / Solid: CBOE actual

quotes.text: Be fearful when others are greedy, and greedy when others are fearful.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: The stock market is a device for transferring money from the impatient to the patient.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: If you aren't willing to own a stock for ten years, don't even think about owning it for ten minutes.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: The day you buy a stock is the day you invest, not when the market crashes.
quotes.author: Peter Lynch

quotes.text: Know what you own, and know why you own it.
quotes.author: Peter Lynch

quotes.text: If you can't explain why a stock should rise in 30 seconds, don't buy it.
quotes.author: Peter Lynch

quotes.text: The margin of safety is the central concept of investment.
quotes.author: Benjamin Graham

quotes.text: In the short run, the market is a voting machine; in the long run, it is a weighing machine.
quotes.author: Benjamin Graham

quotes.text: Investment is most intelligent when it is most businesslike.
quotes.author: Benjamin Graham

quotes.text: It's far better to buy a wonderful company at a fair price than a fair company at a wonderful price.
quotes.author: Charlie Munger

quotes.text: Compound interest is the eighth wonder of the world. He who understands it, earns it; he who doesn't, pays it.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Diversification is protection against ignorance. It makes little sense if you know what you're doing.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: Markets are always wrong. That wrongness is the opportunity.
quotes.author: George Soros

quotes.text: Bull markets are born on pessimism, grow on skepticism, mature on optimism, and die on euphoria.
quotes.author: John Templeton

quotes.text: The best investment you can make is in yourself.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: To make money, you need to know something others don't.
quotes.author: Howard Marks

quotes.text: Risk comes from not knowing what you're doing.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: It's far better to buy a wonderful company at a fair price than a fair company at a wonderful price.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett
